title: oci-hooks.5: Discuss directory precedence and monitoring
body: We've had this functionality since #686, but didn't have any user-facing docs for it.  And Podman/libpod doesn't use this yet, but CRI-O will if/when kubernetes-incubator/cri-o#1517 lands.
